Package org.eventb.core.pm

Interface IUserSupportDelta

All Known Implementing Classes:
UserSupportDelta
public interface IUserSupportDelta
Since:
1.0

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    ADDED
    Status constant indicating that the user support has been added.
    static final int
    CHANGED
    Status constant indicating that the element has been changed, as described by the change flags.
    static final int
    F_CURRENT
    Change flag indicating that the current proof obligation of the user support has been changed.
    static final int
    F_INFORMATION
    Change flag indicating that information about the user support has changed in some way.
    static final int
    F_STATE
    Change flag indicating that proof state of the user support has changed in some way.
    static final int
    REMOVED
    Status constant indicating that the user support has been removed.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IProofStateDelta[]
    getAddedProofStates()
    Returns deltas for the proof states that have been added.
    IProofStateDelta[]
    getAffectedProofStates()
    Returns deltas for the affected (added, removed or changed) proof states.
    IProofStateDelta[]
    getChangedProofStates()
    Returns deltas for the proof states that have been changed.
    int
    getFlags()
    Returns flags that describe how an user support has changed.
    IUserSupportInformation[]
    getInformation()
    Getting the list of information about the changes in user support (including the output of the applied tactics, messages about the last action in the user support, etc.)
    int
    getKind()
    Returns the kind of this delta - one of ADDED, REMOVED, or CHANGED.
    IProofStateDelta[]
    getRemovedProofStates()
    Returns deltas for the proof states that have been removed.
    IUserSupport
    getUserSupport()
    Returns the user support that this delta describes a change to.

  • Field Details

    • ADDED

      static final int ADDED
      Status constant indicating that the user support has been added. Note that an added Rodin element delta has no proof state delta, as they are all implicitely added.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • REMOVED

      static final int REMOVED
      Status constant indicating that the user support has been removed. Note that an added Rodin element delta has no proof state delta, as they are all implicitely removed.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CHANGED

      static final int CHANGED
      Status constant indicating that the element has been changed, as described by the change flags.
      See Also:
      • getFlags()
      • Constant Field Values

    • F_CURRENT

      static final int F_CURRENT
      Change flag indicating that the current proof obligation of the user support has been changed.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • F_STATE

      static final int F_STATE
      Change flag indicating that proof state of the user support has changed in some way.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • F_INFORMATION

      static final int F_INFORMATION
      Change flag indicating that information about the user support has changed in some way.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • getUserSupport

      IUserSupport getUserSupport()
      Returns the user support that this delta describes a change to.

      Returns:
      the user support that this delta describes a change to

    • getKind

      int getKind()
      Returns the kind of this delta - one of ADDED, REMOVED, or CHANGED.
      Returns:
      the kind of this delta

    • getFlags

      int getFlags()
      Returns flags that describe how an user support has changed. Such flags should be tested using the & operand. For example: 
       if ((delta.getFlags() & IUserSupportDelta.F_CURRENT) != 0) {
        // the delta indicates the current proof obligation has changed
 }
      Returns:
      flags that describe how an user support has changed

    • getAddedProofStates

      IProofStateDelta[] getAddedProofStates()
      Returns deltas for the proof states that have been added.

      Returns:
      deltas for the proof states that have been added

    • getRemovedProofStates

      IProofStateDelta[] getRemovedProofStates()
      Returns deltas for the proof states that have been removed.

      Returns:
      deltas for the proof states that have been removed

    • getChangedProofStates

      IProofStateDelta[] getChangedProofStates()
      Returns deltas for the proof states that have been changed.

      Returns:
      deltas for the proof states that have been changed

    • getAffectedProofStates

      IProofStateDelta[] getAffectedProofStates()
      Returns deltas for the affected (added, removed or changed) proof states.

      Returns:
      deltas for the affected (added, removed or changed) proof states

    • getInformation

      IUserSupportInformation[] getInformation()
      Getting the list of information about the changes in user support (including the output of the applied tactics, messages about the last action in the user support, etc.)
      Returns:
      an array of IUserSupportInformation
